name: TouchCart Mobile Application

Products have been successfully configured for TouchCart listing and synchronization."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Create Product Export Templates"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In addition to product data synchronization through the Neto API, TouchCart implements auxiliary export templates to execute incremental synchronization operations, ensuring real-time data consistency between the Neto platform and the TouchCart mobile application."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "These export templates contain account-specific configuration parameters unique to your TouchCart account. Export template operations must be performed post-onboarding. Contact "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://touchcart.com/contact-us", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "TouchCart", "bold": true}]}, {"text": " technical support for implementation assistance or configuration inquiries."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Process TouchCart Sales Orders"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sales orders transmitted from TouchCart to the Neto platform follow standard order processing workflows identical to those of other sales channels. Product synchronization can be terminated using three distinct methods:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Individual Product Termination", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Navigate to "}, {"text": "Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " >> "}, {"text": "Active", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Access the product detail page by selecting the relevant SKU, then deselect the ""}, {"text": "Approved to show on TouchCart", "bold": true}, {"text": "" attribute."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Bulk Product Termination", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Navigate to "}, {"text": "Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " >> "}, {"text": "Active", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Select target products using the corresponding checkboxes, then execute the ""}, {"text": "Unapprove for TouchCart", "bold": true}, {"text": "" action from the ""}, {"text": "With x Selected", "bold": true}, {"text": "" dropdown menu located at the base of the product list."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Import-Based Termination", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Execute a product import operation with the ""}, {"text": "Approved For TouchCart", "bold": true}, {"text": "" column value set to ""}, {"text": "N", "bold": true}, {"text": ""."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Uninstall the TouchCart Add-on"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Important:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Account closure must be completed with TouchCart before initiating the uninstallation sequence.
